title: Volatiles emitted by the entomopathogenic fungus Beauveria bassiana elicit growth and defense in sorghum plants
author: Adame-Garnica, Sandra Goretti
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Raw data and metadata of  SbCOI-1  and  SbPR-1  gene expression by qPCR technique of   Sorghum bicolor  samples exposed to fungal volatiles of the entomopathogenic fungus  Beauveria bassiana  of strain AS5 and strain AI2, as well as the compound 3-methylbutanol.
steps_raw: Raw data and metadata of  SbCOI-1  and  SbPR-1  gene expression by qPCR technique of   Sorghum bicolor  samples exposed to fungal volatiles of the entomopathogenic fungus  Beauveria bassiana  of strain AS5 and strain AI2, as well as the compound 3-methylbutanol.
